title: Project Manager
description:
Prospect Protection Pte Ltd is seeking a Senior Project Manager to lead end-to-end delivery of security-related projects across clients and internal operations. You will manage project planning, stakeholder coordination, site implementation, vendor delivery, and handover—ensuring projects are delivered on time, within scope and budget, and aligned with operational and compliance requirements. This role requires a hands-on, adaptable individual who can work across field operations, systems, and service delivery in a fast-paced environment.

Key Responsibilities

1) Project Delivery (End-to-End)

Manage multiple projects from initiation to closure: scope, schedule, budget, resources, risks, and deliverables.

Develop project plans, milestones, implementation checklists, and handover documentation.

Continue Track progress, manage change requests, and provide regular updates to stakeholders.

2) Security Operations & Site Implementation

Coordinate site surveys, deployment schedules, and on-site execution with operations teams.

Ensure smooth transition from implementation to BAU (business-as-usual) operations.

Drive issue resolution quickly during deployment and stabilization phases.

3) Security Systems / Technology Enablement (where applicable)

Lead projects involving security technology and platforms such as:

CCTV / VMS, access control, alarm systems, visitor management

Patrol/guard tour systems, incident reporting workflows

Ops platforms, HR platforms, Learning Management System (LMS) rollouts or enhancements

Coordinate configurations, user access requirements, testing, training, and go-live support.

4) Stakeholder & Client Management

Engage clients, internal stakeholders, and site teams to clarify requirements and manage expectations.

Conduct project meetings, minutes, action tracking, and issue escalation.

5) Vendor & Contractor Management

Manage vendors/sub-contractors: quotations, timelines, quality checks, delivery acceptance, and service levels.

Validate invoices and manage procurement coordination where needed.

6) Quality, Documentation & Compliance

Maintain clear project documentation (SOW, SOPs, risk registers, test results, handover packs).

Ensure work is aligned with project management, safety, security, and data handling practices relevant to the project scope.

7) Per-Sales and Post Sales

Analyse the client’s industry, pain points, and technical requirements. Develop technical solutions or prototypes aligned with customer.

Ensure compatibility with client infrastructure and address integration concerns and guide customers through setup, configuration, and deployment of the solution

Manage contract renewals and identify opportunities for upselling or cross-selling and address post-purchase queries, troubleshoot problems, and maintain service quality

Provide user training and resources to ensure effective adoption and gather customer feedback to improve products and services

Requirements (Must Have)

Diploma or Degree in Project Management / Engineering / IT / Security Management (or equivalent experience).

Minimum 5 years and above of project management experience, preferably in a services/operations environment.

Demonstrated ability to manage stakeholders, vendors, and cross-functional teams.

Strong planning, coordination, and execution discipline; comfortable handling multiple projects concurrently.

Good written and verbal communication skills (reports, updates, documentation).

Willingness to visit sites and support deployments when required.

Good to Have (Advantage)

Experience in security services or physical security systems (CCTV/VMS, access control, alarms, guard tour).

Experience rolling out enterprise platforms (Ops platform, HRIS/HR platform, LMS) or process transformation initiatives.

Project management certification (e.g., PMP, PRINCE2, Agile/Scrum).

Familiarity with SLA-based service delivery and operational readiness/handover.

postedCompany.description:
PROSPECT PROTECTION PTE. LTD.

The Prospect Group is your premier provider for manpower services. It comprises of Prospect Consulting, Prospect Outsourcing and Prospect Protection. A company operating in S E Asia operating in cities of Singapore and Malaysia, the Prospect Group works with MNCs, Public Listed Companies, Large Local Corporations, the Financial and Banking Institution and many SMEs in the region. The Prospect Groups serves more than 500 prominent clients in the region and currently employs approximately 60 internal staff. The Prospect Group is always focused on growth and intends to operate in 10 Asian cities within the next 5 years. It currently works with reliable partners in India, Philippines, and Indonesia while continually expanding to meet regional assignments.  

 

Our Vision 

A service driven organization going beyond providing security services; personalizing our services & deliver with a touch of care & sincerity.  

 

Our Mission 

We develop a Customer First service mindset security organization going beyond high standards of security outsourcing services through an integration of sound business standards, ethical work practices, and fair profits coupled with ongoing people development and technology enhancements.  

 

Prospect Protection 

Prospect Protection is licensed by the Singapore Police Force to carry out security outsourcing and investigation services. It has established a sound track record in providing customized security solutions to organizations seeking security assistance. Prospect Protection has professionally and continuously provided services based on industry expertise to a multiple of industries in Singapore and surrounding islands. Our services has been extended to broad range of industries namely the commercial and retail, hospitality, petrochemical, logistics, education, aerospace, and many more. 

 

We are a member of the Association of Certified Security Agencies in Singapore with the objective of updating our knowledge with the latest security issues/products and safety standards.
